assumptions: The analysis is for consolidated financial statements.

The declared intragroup dividend has created a foreign-currency monetary receivable between group entities with different functional currencies, so the related foreign exchange effects are not fully eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognised intragroup foreign-currency receivable is the directly relevant hedged item model under IFRS 9's exception for intragroup monetary items in consolidated financial statements.
